# Thrift 56

> Tracie hunts thrift stores for forgotten objects, transforms them into one-of-a-kind art, and films every step. Found. Transformed. Released.

Thrift 56 is a creator-led art brand. Every piece is discovered at a thrift store, hand-restored in the studio, documented on YouTube, and released to the community. Hook: "This was $3. It deserved better."

## Pages

- [Home](/): Latest transformation, drop list signup, featured pieces.
- [Episodes](/episodes): Every transformation episode, before/after, studio process.
- [Art Drops](/drops): Tiered narrative releases — current, resurrected, curated, vault, archive.
- [Shop](/shop): One-of-a-kind transformed pieces and curated thrift finds.
- [Community](/community): Vote on what gets transformed, submit your own finds.
- [Livestream](/livestream): Live thrift hunts and studio sessions.
- [About](/about): The story behind Thrift 56 and Tracie's process.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the studio.

## Optional

- [Policies](/policies): Shipping, returns, product safety.
